title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BOGTONG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUSUANGA, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1436 / 55 OG No. 38, 8101 (September 21, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2539, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BOGTONG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BUSUANGA, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Bogtong in the Municipality of Busuanga, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Bogtong.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
